global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a logo, headline, body text, and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a 30% discount on products from LuxShelf.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: LuxShelf logo
elements.description: A prominent logo featuring the word 'LuxShelf' in bold, modern typography, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Discount headline
elements.description: A short, eye-catching headline at the top, displaying the text 'Your next favorite pick' in a large, clear font.

elements.label: Discount offer
elements.description: A larger text area at the bottom of the ad, featuring the message '-30% Order now' in a bold, attention-grabbing style.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick -30% Order now

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A clear call to action button labeled 'Order now' in a contrasting color, positioned prominently at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, LuxShelf logo, discount offer, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline, body text in the center, and the call to action at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: LuxShelf, Your next favorite pick, -30%, Order now
